stemHtml: The magnetic variation to convert the RMI bearings of NDBs and VORs to true bearings will occur at the..

options.a: aircraft position for NDBs and at the aircraft position for VORs.
options.b: aircraft position for NDBs and at the beacon position for VORs.
options.c: beacon position for NDBs and at the beacon position VORs.
options.d: beacon position for NDBs and at the aircraft position for VORs.
